overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character exploring the Temple of Athena at dusk. The character walks along ancient stone paths, pauses to overlook a misty valley with ruins, and ascends stairs to the temple entrance while passing other NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient trail leading to temple complex

events.description: character begins climbing up rocks near the temple base
large warrior statue with round shield comes into view on the right

agents.ego_description: walking up the dirt path and climbing rocks to approach the temple structure

notable_agents.action: standing on rocks overlooking the path, holding a spear

entered.detail: tall stone pillar with decorative capital flanking the path
large stone temple with red banners hanging on the facade
stone statue of armored warrior holding round shield and spear
tall dark green cypress trees near temple entrance
bushes with bright red flowers lining the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail flanked by red flowers and ancient stone columns, approaching the Temple of Athena at dusk. A lone NPC stands guard on the rocks to the right as the character climbs up to view the large warrior statue and temple facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: shifts from temple base to open valley overlook with stone brazier
camera pans across the valley to reveal distant ruins and mountains

agents.ego_description: standing at overlook panning camera to view the ancient ruins and mountains below

entered.detail: stone altar with burning fire on platform edge
hazy purple mountains layered in the background
scattered stone ruins and buildings in the valley below
rows of trees in agricultural terraces on hillside

segments.scene_description: From the stone overlook, the camera pans across a breathtaking view of the valley at dusk. Ancient ruins dot the landscape below, surrounded by olive groves and framed by hazy purple mountains, while a burning brazier provides warm light in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple perimeter walkway and stair ascent

events.description: returns from overlook to walk along the temple base wall
begins ascending wide stone stairs along the temple exterior

agents.ego_description: walking along the temple base and ascending the stone stairs to the upper level

notable_agents.action: walking up the stairs ahead of the character wearing blue robes

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with carved railings leading up temple side
burning fire bowls mounted on stone pedestals along temple wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the base of the temple wall, passing other pedestrians, and begins ascending the grand stone staircase. Burning braziers illuminate the path upward as the temple structure looms on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper temple terrace with entrance columns

events.description: reaches upper terrace platform with geometric stone patterns
approaches temple entrance with tall fluted columns

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper terrace toward the temple entrance, passing burning braziers

notable_agents.action: standing guard at the temple entrance wearing armor and red cape

entered.detail: large burning fire bowls on ornate stone pedestals
tall fluted stone columns at the temple doorway
distant mountain with settlement visible labeled as Sparta

segments.scene_description: On the upper terrace, the character walks past burning braziers overlooking the misty valley toward the temple entrance. A guard stands at the columned doorway as the camera approaches the entrance of the Temple of Athena.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a floral dirt trail up to the grand entrance of the Temple of Athena during a hazy dusk. It begins with the character walking past red flowers and ancient columns, climbing toward a stone overlook where a lone guard stands. As the camera pans away from the temple facade, the view expands across a breathtaking valley of olive groves and ruins framed by purple mountains, with a burning brazier casting a warm glow in the foreground. The scene then shifts back to the temple's base, following the character past pedestrians and up a grand stone staircase illuminated by flickering braziers. Finally, the camera moves across the upper terrace overlooking the misty valley before approaching a guarded, columned doorway at the temple entrance.
